summary: Completed comprehensive testing of March 22 Batch 2 fixes. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Key features verified: HOME pricing ($1,250/$5,000), Become a Sponsor text-only with email link, horizontal scroll challenges, WALKER Karibuni greeting, Team Leave button ghost styling, SUPPORTER pledge amounts showing FULL route completion totals ($450 total, MaryMoves $400, JohnnySteps $50), ADMIN no Inquiries tab, route map upload, milestone photo upload, sponsor capacity display, ONBOARDING photo upload, achievement table, merged invite+share with 3 default rows.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in Stats by Challenge table - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings in AdminPage.js and OnboardingPage.js tables - caused by dynamic rendering wrapper spans inside tbody. Does not affect functionality but should be addressed for cleaner console output.
seed_data_creation: Created test user for onboarding flow verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: All March 22 Batch 2 features verified working. Pledge calculations now use FULL route distance (200km for ch-migration, 100km for ch-naivasha). Supporter dashboard shows correct totals: MaryMoves $400 (200km x $2/km), JohnnySteps $50 (total pledge), Total $450. Admin panel has no Inquiries tab, shows sponsor capacity per level, has route map and milestone photo upload options. Onboarding has photo upload, achievement levels table (Level/Amount/Swag), merged invite+share step with 3 default rows.

HOME.sponsors_spacing: PASS - space-y-16 class provides proper spacing between sponsor levels
HOME.horizontal_scroll_challenges: PASS - overflow-x-auto and snap-x classes present

ADMIN.stats_by_challenge_table: PASS - Stats by Challenge table visible in Stats tab

ONBOARDING.merged_invite_share: PASS - Step 4 has both invite by email and share link in one card
